base_read.sql: SELECT nm.last_name AS LNAME, TO_CHAR(MAX(cr.contact_relationship_id)) AS RID, MAX(cr.contact_type) AS CT, MAX(cr.dependent_flag) AS DF FROM per_contact_relships_f cr JOIN per_person_names_f nm ON (nm.person_id = cr.contact_person_id OR nm.person_id = cr.person_id) AND nm.name_type = 'GLOBAL' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN nm.effective_start_date AND nm.effective_end_date WHERE cr.dependent_flag = 'Y' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN cr.effective_start_date AND cr.effective_end_date AND nm.last_name IN ('Dep${PREFIX}One','Dep${PREFIX}Two','Dep${PREFIX}Bad') GROUP BY nm.last_name
